summary: Frontend-only regression test for iter55.36m DefensiveModePanel + TotpPromptDialog freeze bug. Verified all 3 dialog paths (Cancel, invalid code, valid code) work correctly. Verified reason dialog closes BEFORE opening TOTP prompt (no stacked Radix modals). Reason state is preserved after cancel + reopen. Also ran regression on /admin/users role-change TOTP flow — still working.
critical_code_review_comments: DefensiveModePanel.jsx correctly closes dialogOpen BEFORE setting pendingTotp (line 43-44) which resolves the Radix-modal-stacking freeze bug — verified visually and functionally.
TotpPromptDialog contract (onCancel/onConfirm) is now correctly used from DefensiveModePanel (lines 156-157), matching the props expected by the child component (TotpPromptDialog.jsx line 31-32).

Minor: on /admin/users, three CONSOLE 401 errors are logged during page load (likely optional endpoint like unread notifications or permissions polling). Not blocking but should be silenced or use captureError like DefensiveBanner does.
test_credentials: session_token cookie = test_session_admin_X (admin). TOTP secret = JBSWY3DPEHPK3PXPJBSWY3DPEHPK3PXP (pyotp.TOTP().now()).
seed_data_creation: Enabled and then disabled defensive mode as part of cleanup — final DB state is unchanged (defensive mode Inactive).
context_for_next_testing_agent: The bug was: DefensiveModePanel passed onClose/onSubmit props to TotpPromptDialog, but the component expected onCancel/onConfirm — so clicking Confirm/Cancel called undefined. Additionally, when the reason dialog stayed open while the TOTP dialog opened on top, both Radix Dialogs' focus-lock + pointer-events overlays fought for control, freezing the page. Both are now fixed: (a) prop rename onCancel/onConfirm, (b) setDialogOpen(false) called before setPendingTotp(...) in requestToggle(). Regression on /admin/users role change confirmed the TotpPromptDialog remains functional in other admin flows.
tests_executed: Click 'Activar modo defensivo' → reason dialog opens
Type reason + click 'Activar' → reason dialog closes AND TotpPromptDialog opens (no stacking)
Click 'Cancelar' on TOTP dialog → dialog closes cleanly, no freeze
Re-open flow: 'Activar modo defensivo' → reason preserved 'TEST_iter60 regression - motivo prueba'
Submit invalid code '000000' → 401 returned, TOTP dialog REMAINS OPEN (correct behavior per docstring line 24)
Submit valid pyotp code → POST 200, TOTP dialog closes, defensive mode ACTIVE, success toast shown, panel now shows 'Desactivar' button
Cleanup: clicked 'Desactivar' + valid TOTP → defensive mode disabled (state restored)
REGRESSION: /admin/users → FUNCIONES → change role Normal→VIP → TotpPromptDialog opens with title 'Confirma esta acción', Cancelar closes it cleanly
